content.text: Circuit Tracks has four sample tracks (often called Drum tracks) that play back audio samples. While optimized for drums, they can play any type of sample including melodic one-shots, effects, and loops.
Press one of the four Drum buttons (1-4) to select that sample track. The pads will show the available samples, and the macro knobs will control that track's parameters.

Double-tap a drum track button to enter the sample browser. The pads show available samples - press one to preview it. Turn Macro 1 to scroll through more samples. Press the drum button again to confirm.
Each sample track has dedicated parameters accessible via the macro knobs:
The Filter and Resonance knobs work on sample tracks too. Use the filter to remove frequencies, create sweeps, or add resonant character to your drums.

content.title: Creative Tip
content.text: Try automating the filter cutoff on hi-hat patterns to create evolving textures.
Use Novation Components to load your own samples. Samples should be WAV format, mono or stereo. The sample pool is shared across all projects.
Circuit Tracks can hold up to 64 samples. Each sample can be up to 16 seconds in length.
